items.title: DuckDB schema is versioned in the repo
items.description: QuantA has a first landed DuckDB schema definition plus a generated schema snapshot doc.

items.title: Deterministic local DuckDB bootstrap exists
items.description: A developer can create or refresh the local DuckDB dev foundation from the repo's deterministic seed fixture, including the two-snapshot daily_bar and price_series seed rows used for as-of verification.

items.title: Latest snapshot and stock as-of APIs read from DuckDB
items.description: Backend runtime assembles the latest published snapshot payload plus minimal stock snapshot/kline as-of responses from DuckDB-backed tables rather than reading the JSON fixture directly.

items.title: Developer loop surfaces DuckDB foundation health
items.description: Init and smoke both surface whether the DuckDB-backed local data foundation is ready to support development.

items.title: Daily bar and price series as-of semantics are verified
items.description: The dev seed includes two snapshot generations with a revision on the same trade date, and app smoke verifies that older and newer as-of queries resolve to different effective rows as expected.
